features: 360 Degree Spherical Design: The unique round ball design gently removes leaving your hair soft and shiny, and becoming detangling.

Protect hair: Preserves hair from damage and eliminates dandruff and dirt. Also massages the scalp to improve blood circulation and promote hair growth.
